title: qrafty's Oilrigs
description: This pack adds oilrigs to your Minecraft world! Even though they dont serve any purpose, they are a great copper mine and fun exploring or for being your starter base! 🪙🔦
body:
The pack adds currently one variation of an oilrig to your world. They spawn in every ocean world, and contain predefined loot and the basement of a villager. 
The structure is made overall out of copper and is equipped with some basic stuff, so it is perfect as a starter base.

I would be happy if you join my discord and give me more ideas! :)
### You want more industrial structures? Check out [qraftyfied: Industrial Structures!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied-industrial-structures) 🏭
